pipeline_contract: VMamba-T channels C0-C1 or VMamba-Mesh-T channels C0-C5
staged VSS-style blocks with bidirectional row/column SS2D-style scans
pair embedding head over [left, right, abs(left-right), left*right, auxiliary_features]

artifacts.channel_contract: [{"channel": "C0", "name": "Forward adjacency", "role": "edges in canonical lineage direction"}, {"channel": "C1", "name": "Reverse adjacency", "role": "reverse edges for bidirectional scan context"}]
